EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for Partner leads at the fourth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Partner Lead_4th Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: We still require information to complete your insurance quote
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve been unable to reach you since you were referred to us by {!Lead.Partner_External_Name__c}.
This means I’ve been unable to provide you with the business insurance quote you requested.
If you are interested in proceeding with your quote, reply with the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
